title: HealthEntry
description: Runtime health aggregate for a single relay URL, persisted across CI runs.

consecutive_failures.description: Number of consecutive hard failures; reset to 0 on success.

last_checked.description: Timestamp of the most recent probe attempt, regardless of outcome.

last_error.description: Short, truncated error message from the latest failed probe.

last_outcome.description: Disposition of the most recent probe attempt.

last_success.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful probe.

nip11_software.description: `software` string from the NIP-11 document, if any.

nip11_version.description: `version` string from the NIP-11 document, if any.

rtt_open_ms.description: Open round-trip time of the latest successful handshake (NIP-66 `rtt-open`), in milliseconds.

supported_nips.description: Supported NIP numbers as reported by the relay's NIP-11 document.

Outcome.description: Disposition of the most recent probe attempt, persisted to drive [`HealthEntry::state`].

oneOf.description: No probe has been recorded yet.
A hard failure attributable to the relay (timeout, TLS, protocol, 5xx).
An environmental block outside the relay's control (WAF 4xx, DNS).
The probe was deliberately skipped (e.g. onion without a Tor proxy).
